zh.lifeSummary: 當Fernán Gómez de Toledo於1282年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，他的父親Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque26歲，母親Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo24歲。他於1307年與Teresa Vázquez del Saz在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1331年10月23日在西班牙雷吉昂 德 莫夕亞莫夕亞享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fernán Gómez de Toledo于1282年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，他的父亲Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque26岁，母亲Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo24岁。他于1307年与Teresa Vázquez del Saz在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1331年10月23日在西班牙雷吉昂 德 莫夕亞莫夕亞享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toledo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Jorge, Manuel, Ramon, Rafael, Juan, Antonio, Jesus, Miguel, Roberto, Carlos, Francisco.

Spanish and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from the city in central Spain, which was the capital of the Visigothic state between the 6th and 8th centuries. Its role declined for three centuries after the Muslim invasion of Spain, until it was taken as the capital of the kingdom of Castile between the 11th and 16th centuries. It was a major cultural and political center throughout the Middle Ages, and was also the home of an important Jewish community. The placename, first recorded in Latin as Toletum, is of obscure etymology, possibly connected with Toleto in Piedmont; Jewish tradition connects it with Hebrew toledot ‘generations’, but this is no more than folk etymology. Compare Toledano .

Jewish (Sephardic): also an adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the surname their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Toledano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Shlomo, Igal, Moshe, Shimon, Ehud, Shmuel, Yehuda.  Spanish Alberto, Gonzalo, Alina, Carlos, Conrado, Elena, Enrique, Evelia, Luis, Manuel, Miguel, Ramona.  French Gabrielle, Michel.
Spanish and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name for someone from Toledo (see   Toledo  ), from an adjectival form of the placename.

nameMeanings.name: Fernán
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

nameMeanings.name: Gómez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘complete’ in Hebrew), borne by a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah. It is in occasional use in the United States. Gomer is also an English surname, derived from an Old English personal name composed of gōd ‘good’ + mǣr ‘famous’, and the given name may also be a transferred use of this.

en.lifeSummary: When Fernán Gómez de Toledo was born in 1282, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, his father, Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque, was 26 and his mother, Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo, was 24. He married Teresa Vázquez del Saz in 1307, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 October 1331, in Murcia, Región de Murcia, Spain, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fernán Gómez de Toledo est né en 1282, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Teresa Vázquez del Saz en 1307, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 octobre 1331, à Murcia, Región de Murcia, Espagne, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fernán Gómez de Toledo 1282 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque 26 und seine Mutter Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo 24. Er hat 1307 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Teresa Vázquez del Saz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Oktober 1331 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Murcia, Región de Murcia, Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fernán Gómez de Toledo è nato il nel 1282 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, il suo padre, Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Teresa Vázquez del Saz nel 1307, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 ottobre 1331, nel Murcia, Región de Murcia, Spagna, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fernán Gómez de Toledoが1282年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomequeは26歳，母Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledoは24歳であった。1307年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでTeresa Vázquez del Sazと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1331年10月23日にスペインレジoン ド ムルシアムルシアで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fernán Gómez de Toledo(이)가 1282년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1307년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Teresa Vázquez del Saz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1331년 10월 23일 스페인 레지o 데 머샤 머샤에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fernán Gómez de Toledo nasceu em 1282, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Teresa Vázquez del Saz em 1307, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1331, em Murcia, Región de Murcia, Espanha, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fernán Gómez de Toledo родился в 1282 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, его отцу по имени Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Teresa Vázquez del Saz в 1307 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 октября 1331 г. в местности мурся, региoн де мурся, Испания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fernán Gómez de Toledo nació en 1282, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Gomez Perez De Toledo Y Palomeque, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Doña Horabuena Gutiérrez de Toledo, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Teresa Vázquez del Saz en 1307, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1331, en Murcia, Región de Murcia, España, a la edad de 49 años.
